title: Hindustan Copper HCL Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 70 Posts
job_category: Schedule-A Miniratna Category-I Central Public Sector Enterprise (CPSE)
short_info: The latest Hindustan Copper Limited (HCL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Deputy Manager (E2), Manager (E3), and Senior Manager (E4) posts! Published on 16-05-2026 at Hindustan Copper Limited Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 70 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the minimum 18 years and above age group and possessing a relevant Bachelor’s Degree / Post Graduate Degree / CA / CMA / MBA / MBBS qualification as per post requirement can apply online from 05-06-2026 to 25-06-2026. Find all details about the HCL Executive new vacancy 2026, including eligib

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on HCL website

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 500/- (Rupees Five Hundred only) + applicable Bank charges
application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application processing fee as specified below. The fee must be paid online through the Payment Gateway / NEFT Online Transfer via HCL's website only. No other form of remittance shall be accepted. Fee paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of reckoning (01-05-2026). Only Indian Nationals aged 18 years and above are eligible to apply. Educational qualifications must be from Government / UGC / AIU / AICTE recognized institutes. Equivalent qualifications shall be considered as per Government / UGC / AIU / AICTE guidelines. | Educational Qualification (Discipline-wise) | Age Relaxation

vacancy_details.Remark: If candidate/s not available in identified category, post/s may be filled by interchanging among other identified PwBD categories.

If candidate/s not available, one post may be filled by interchanging among other identified PwBD categories. Thereafter, if no suitable PwBD candidate is available, post/s may be filled by a non-PwBD person.

selection_process: For every completed year of relevant experience beyond minimum requirement 1 Mark per year
For every additional higher qualification over the minimum essential qualification (relevant cadre/discipline only) 1 Mark each, subject to maximum 2 Marks
Tie-break: Higher company turnover gets higher rank –
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the HCL website career section (www.hindustancopper.com). No manual/paper applications will be entertained.
The online portal opens on 05-06-2026 (11:00 AM) and closes on 25-06-2026 (Till Midnight).

Candidates must register on the HCL website under the career section before filling the application. Candidates are advised to read the "How to fill the Online Application form" instructions on the website before applying.
Documents to be Submitted / Verified at the time of Personal Interview:
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals of 18 years and above are eligible to apply. Date of reckoning for age, experience, and qualification is 01-05-2026. Experience acquired in Training / Consultancy / Teaching / Fellowship / Internship / Apprenticeship / Academic Project shall not be counted. Experience in relevant field only shall be considered; HCL's decision on relevance is final. Candidates from private organizations must be from companies with turnover of Rs. 250 Crores or more. Selected candidates must execute a Service Agreement Bond of Rs. 3 Lakhs and serve a minimum of 3 years. Government / CPSE employees must route their application through proper channel or submit NOC at the time of interview. OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates must submit OBC-NCL certificate issued on or after 01-04-2026. EWS candidates must submit EWS certificate valid for the year 2026-27. Category once filled/declared in the online application will not be changed. All amendments/corrigendum will be communicated only through the HCL website - candidates should visit regularly. Exact percentage of marks should be mentioned; rounding off of marks should not be done. Email ID and mobile number provided in the application must remain active till recruitment is complete. Canvassing directly or indirectly shall disqualify the candidature. Legal jurisdiction for any dispute arising out of this recruitment shall be Kolkata only. HCL is an Equal Opportunity Employer and encourages workplace diversity.
